untranslatable_reason: This is a behavioral/execution rule (disciplined entry execution + mental rehearsal), not a quantitative position sizing method. It describes HOW to enter (without second-guessing), not HOW MUCH to risk. The parameters given (max_adverse_excursion_percent, confirmation_bars_required, position_size_percent_of_plan) are entry timing conditions and a position scaling modifier (0.75), but lack a base sizing methodology or risk metric to translate into FIXED_FRACTIONAL, R_MULTIPLE, VOLATILITY_SCALED, etc. Use standard entry DSL for execution discipline rules.
